attack_trace_retention.policy: preserve_attack_traces_as_blocking_counterevidence_until an approved solver run discharges or refines them

coverage_decision.reason: The approved Testnet threat model contains remote-payload claims for network binding, fresh account provenance, review/auth ordering, signing decision ordering, submission UI ordering, audit boundaries, and explicit protocol gaps. Tamarin and ProVerif are required lanes; unavailable solvers or missing ProVerif projection block Testnet assurance.

run.stdout:
theory XamanTestnetPayload

begin

// Function signature and definition of the equational theory E

functions: fst/1, h/1, pair/2, payload_id/1, pk/1, redaction_digest/1,
           sign/2, snd/1, true/0, ui_result/1, verify/3, xrpl_mainnet/0,
           xrpl_testnet/0
equations:
    fst(<x.1, x.2>) = x.1,
    snd(<x.1, x.2>) = x.2,
    verify(sign(x.1, x.2), x.1, pk(x.2)) = true

rule (modulo E) Remote_Service_Issues_Redacted_Testnet_Payload:
   [ Fr( ~payload ), Fr( ~account ) ]
  --[
  RemotePayloadIssued( ~payload ), TestnetBound( ~payload ),
  FreshTestnetAccountBoundary( ~account ),
  AuditRedactionPreserved( ~payload )
  ]->
   [
   Out( <xrpl_testnet, payload_id(~payload), redaction_digest(~payload)> ),
   !ReviewedTestnetPayload( ~payload, payload_id(~payload),
                            redaction_digest(~payload), ~account
   )
   ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */

rule (modulo E) Device_Intakes_Categorical_Payload:
   [
   In( <xrpl_testnet, payload_id(payload), redaction_digest(payload)> ),
   !ReviewedTestnetPayload( payload, payload_id(payload),
                            redaction_digest(payload), account
   )
   ]
  --[
  PayloadIntakeCategorical( payload ), TestnetBound( payload ),
  FreshTestnetAccountBoundary( account ),
  AuditRedactionPreserved( payload )
  ]->
   [ ReviewablePayload( payload, account ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */

rule (modulo E) Device_Reviews_Payload:
   [ ReviewablePayload( payload, account ) ]
  --[
  PayloadReviewed( payload ), TestnetBound( payload ),
  FreshTestnetAccountBoundary( account ),
  AuditRedactionPreserved( payload )
  ]->
   [ ReviewedPayload( payload, account ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */

rule (modulo E) Operator_Authorizes_After_Review:
   [ ReviewedPayload( payload, account ) ]
  --[ AuthDecisionAuthorized( payload ), AuditRedactionPreserved( payload )
  ]->
   [ AuthorizedPayload( payload, account ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */

rule (modulo E) Device_Observes_Signing_Decision:
   [ AuthorizedPayload( payload, account ) ]
  --[
  SigningDecisionObserved( payload ), AuditRedactionPreserved( payload )
  ]->
   [
   SignedDecision( payload, account,
                   sign(payload_id(payload), redaction_digest(payload))
   )
   ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */

rule (modulo E) Device_Observes_Submit_UI:
   [ SignedDecision( payload, account, signature ) ]
  --[
  SubmitAttemptObserved( payload ), SubmitResultObserved( payload ),
  AuditRedactionPreserved( payload )
  ]->
   [ Out( <ui_result(payload), signature> ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */

rule (modulo E) Preserve_Attack_Wrong_Network:
   [ Fr( ~payload ) ]
  --[ AttackTraceWrongNetwork( ~payload ) ]->
   [ Out( <xrpl_mainnet, payload_id(~payload), redaction_digest(~payload)> )
   ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */

rule (modulo E) Preserve_Attack_Imported_Production_Account:
   [ Fr( ~account ) ]
  --[ AttackTraceImportedProductionAccount( ~account ) ]->
   [ Out( ~account ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */

rule (modulo E) Preserve_Attack_Signing_Before_Auth:
   [ Fr( ~payload ) ]
  --[ AttackTraceSigningBeforeAuth( ~payload ) ]->
   [
   Out( <payload_id(~payload), 
         sign(payload_id(~payload), redaction_digest(~payload))>
   )
   ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */

rule (modulo E) Preserve_Attack_Replay_Duplicate_Resolution:
   [ Fr( ~payload ) ]
  --[ AttackTraceReplayDuplicateResolution( ~payload ) ]->
   [ Out( <payload_id(~payload), payload_id(~payload)> ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */

rule (modulo E) Preserve_Attack_Raw_Payload_Material:
   [ Fr( ~payload ) ]
  --[ AttackTraceRawPayloadMaterial( ~payload ) ]->
   [ Out( ~payload ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */

rule (modulo E) Preserve_Attack_Raw_Signature_Blob:
   [ Fr( ~payload ) ]
  --[ AttackTraceRawSignatureBlob( ~payload ) ]->
   [ Out( sign(payload_id(~payload), redaction_digest(~payload)) ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */

rule (modulo E) Preserve_Attack_Forged_Broadcast_Finality:
   [ Fr( ~payload ) ]
  --[ AttackTraceForgedBroadcastFinality( ~payload ) ]->
   [ Out( <ui_result(~payload), xrpl_mainnet> ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */

rule (modulo E) Preserve_Attack_Decline_Gap:
   [ Fr( ~payload ) ]
  --[ AttackTraceDeclineGap( ~payload ) ]->
   [ Out( <payload_id(~payload), 'decline_gap'> ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */

rule (modulo E) Preserve_Attack_Cancel_Gap:
   [ Fr( ~payload ) ]
  --[ AttackTraceCancelGap( ~payload ) ]->
   [ Out( <payload_id(~payload), 'cancel_gap'> ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */

rule (modulo E) Preserve_Attack_Expiry_Gap:
   [ Fr( ~payload ) ]
  --[ AttackTraceExpiryGap( ~payload ) ]->
   [ Out( <payload_id(~payload), 'expiry_gap'> ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */

lemma review_requires_testnet_binding:
  all-traces
  "∀ payload #i.
    (PayloadReviewed( payload ) @ #i) ⇒
    (∃ #j. (TestnetBound( payload ) @ #j) ∧ (#j < #i))"
/*
guarded formula characterizing all counter-examples:
"∃ payload #i.
  (PayloadReviewed( payload ) @ #i)
 ∧
  ∀ #j. (TestnetBound( payload ) @ #j) ⇒ ¬(#j < #i)"
*/
simplify
solve( ReviewablePayload( payload, account ) ▶₀ #i )
  case Device_Intakes_Categorical_Payload
  by contradiction /* from formulas */
qed

lemma review_requires_fresh_testnet_account:
  all-traces
  "∀ payload #i.
    (PayloadReviewed( payload ) @ #i) ⇒
    (∃ account #j.
      (FreshTestnetAccountBoundary( account ) @ #j) ∧ (#j < #i))"
/*
guarded formula characterizing all counter-examples:
"∃ payload #i.
  (PayloadReviewed( payload ) @ #i)
 ∧
  ∀ account #j. (FreshTestnetAccountBoundary( account ) @ #j) ⇒ ¬(#j < #i)"
*/
simplify
solve( ReviewablePayload( payload, account ) ▶₀ #i )
  case Device_Intakes_Categorical_Payload
  by contradiction /* from formulas */
qed

lemma auth_requires_review:
  all-traces
  "∀ payload #i.
    (AuthDecisionAuthorized( payload ) @ #i) ⇒
    (∃ #j. (PayloadReviewed( payload ) @ #j) ∧ (#j < #i))"
/*
guarded formula characterizing all counter-examples:
"∃ payload #i.
  (AuthDecisionAuthorized( payload ) @ #i)
 ∧
  ∀ #j. (PayloadReviewed( payload ) @ #j) ⇒ ¬(#j < #i)"
*/
simplify
solve( ReviewedPayload( payload, account ) ▶₀ #i )
  case Device_Reviews_Payload
  by contradiction /* from formulas */
qed

lemma signing_decision_requires_review_and_auth:
  all-traces
  "∀ payload #i.
    (SigningDecisionObserved( payload ) @ #i) ⇒
    (∃ #j #k.
      (((PayloadReviewed( payload ) @ #j) ∧
        (AuthDecisionAuthorized( payload ) @ #k)) ∧
       (#j < #i)) ∧
      (#k < #i))"
/*
guarded formula characterizing all counter-examples:
"∃ payload #i.
  (SigningDecisionObserved( payload ) @ #i)
 ∧
  ∀ #j #k.
   (PayloadReviewed( payload ) @ #j) ∧
   (AuthDecisionAuthorized( payload ) @ #k)
  ⇒
   ((¬(#j < #i)) ∨ (¬(#k < #i)))"
*/
simplify
solve( AuthorizedPayload( payload, account ) ▶₀ #i )
  case Operator_Authorizes_After_Review
  by contradiction /* from formulas */
qed

lemma submit_ui_requires_signing_decision:
  all-traces
  "∀ payload #i.
    (SubmitAttemptObserved( payload ) @ #i) ⇒
    (∃ #j. (SigningDecisionObserved( payload ) @ #j) ∧ (#j < #i))"
/*
guarded formula characterizing all counter-examples:
"∃ payload #i.
  (SubmitAttemptObserved( payload ) @ #i)
 ∧
  ∀ #j. (SigningDecisionObserved( payload ) @ #j) ⇒ ¬(#j < #i)"
*/
simplify
solve( SignedDecision( payload, account, signature ) ▶₀ #i )
  case Device_Observes_Signing_Decision
  by contradiction /* from formulas */
qed

lemma preserved_attack_traces_are_reachable:
  exists-trace
  "∃ wrong_network_payload account signing_before_auth_payload
     replay_payload raw_payload signature_payload finality_payload
     decline_payload cancel_payload expiry_payload #i #j #k #l #m #n #o #p #q
     #r.
    (((((((((AttackTraceWrongNetwork( wrong_network_payload ) @ #i) ∧
            (AttackTraceImportedProductionAccount( account ) @ #j)) ∧
           (AttackTraceSigningBeforeAuth( signing_before_auth_payload ) @ #k)) ∧
          (AttackTraceReplayDuplicateResolution( replay_payload ) @ #l)) ∧
         (AttackTraceRawPayloadMaterial( raw_payload ) @ #m)) ∧
        (AttackTraceRawSignatureBlob( signature_payload ) @ #n)) ∧
       (AttackTraceForgedBroadcastFinality( finality_payload ) @ #o)) ∧
      (AttackTraceDeclineGap( decline_payload ) @ #p)) ∧
     (AttackTraceCancelGap( cancel_payload ) @ #q)) ∧
    (AttackTraceExpiryGap( expiry_payload ) @ #r)"

  (AttackTraceRawPayloadMaterial( raw_payload ) @ #m) ∧
  (AttackTraceRawSignatureBlob( signature_payload ) @ #n) ∧

  (AttackTraceDeclineGap( decline_payload ) @ #p) ∧

*/

unresolved_required_assumptions.description: The Testnet verifier APK and emulator trial are public-Testnet evidence only and cannot approve production release behavior.
required_evidence_to_clear: reviewer signoff and replacement evidence bundle

unresolved_required_assumptions.description: Network binding is limited to the reviewed Testnet verifier run, endpoint digest, server_info digest, and network_id 1 observation.
Fresh account provenance is accepted only as reviewed categorical verifier evidence; no account address, seed, or credential material is retained.
required_evidence_to_clear: reviewed wallet provenance trace with allowed account identifiers redacted by policy

unresolved_required_assumptions.description: Lifecycle action order is based on the reviewed operator UI trial, not on raw device automation logs or production telemetry.
required_evidence_to_clear: reviewer signoff and replacement evidence bundle

unresolved_required_assumptions.description: The artifacts retain categorical outcomes, source digests, and redaction digests only; raw security material is intentionally excluded.
required_evidence_to_clear: reviewer signoff and replacement evidence bundle

unresolved_required_assumptions.description: Raw payload JSON, request bodies, payload semantics, and digest-to-signed-byte reconstruction are outside this reviewed evidence set.
required_evidence_to_clear: reviewer signoff and replacement evidence bundle

unresolved_required_assumptions.description: Native vault, biometric/passcode, keychain, and signing cryptography behavior is not proved by the reviewed Testnet lifecycle evidence.
Raw signatures, signed transaction blobs, and account identifiers are redacted and cannot be reconstructed from this model.
XRPL submission is modeled as UI submit categories only; node honesty, broadcast request material, mempool, queue, inclusion, and finality are not proved.
Replay, backend atomic single-use, duplicate submission, expiration enforcement, and conflict handling were not exercised by the reviewed trial.
Decline/refusal, cancellation, and expiry actions appear only as reviewed coverage gaps and are not modeled as successful runtime paths.
The verifier APK and emulator trace do not prove deployed production runtime equivalence.

unsupported_protocol_semantics.reason: Raw payloads, request bodies, and transaction blobs were not recorded.
Raw signatures and signed transaction blobs were not retained.
The Testnet verifier run is not production runtime-equivalence evidence.
The reviewed lifecycle event list has no replay or duplicate-submit exercise.
Cancellation is present only as a not-exercised reviewed coverage gap.
Expiry is present only as a not-exercised reviewed coverage gap.
The report cannot reconstruct transaction blobs and does not prove XRPL broadcast, inclusion, or finality.
Refusal/decline is present only as a not-exercised reviewed coverage gap.
